subject: american electric power service corporation - cws

emails.subject: American Electric Power Service Corporation - cws
emails.subject_base: American Electric Power Service Corporation - cws
emails.body: American Electric Power Service Corporation cws David/Genia, Attached please find the credit terms to insert into the draft EEI Master Power Purchase Sale Agreement between American Electric Power Service Corporation ("AEPSC" as agent) and Enron Power Marketing, Inc. Please note that pursuant to AEPSC's status as agent for (9) utilities, the covenants/financial reporting requirements noted herein will apply to any of the (9) utilities listed in Sheet 2 of the attachment. Sheet 3 contains the current ratings of all (9) utilities and has been provided as additional information for the sake of showing that all utilities are in compliance as of today if measured by the proposed covenants. Please call with any questions. Regards, Tracy 503-464-8755
